title: SpongeMixins 1.7.10
description: A modrinth mirror of TimeConqueror's SpongeMixins for 1.7.10
body:
This project is just a Modrinth mirror of https://github.com/TimeConqueror/SpongeMixins.

TimeConqueror's SpongeMixins is a library that provides SpongePowered Mixins for 1.7.10 forge mods without requiring each individual mod to separately shade it in.
